channel.title: 2026-04-17 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-17 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Entropy of Strongly Correlated Electrons in a Partially Filled Landau Level
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Alexandre Assouline, Taige Wang, Heun Mo Yoo, Ruihua Fan, Fangyuan Yang, Ruining Zhang, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Michael P. Zaletel, and Andrea F. Young
Author(s): Alexandre Assouline, Taige Wang, Heun Mo Yoo, Ruihua Fan, Fangyuan Yang, Ruining Zhang, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Michael P. Zaletel, and Andrea F. Young Entropy measurements in partially filled Landau levels reveal the successive freezing of spin and motional degrees of freedom, reaching sensitivities that constrain the isolation of topological entropy in non-Abelian quantum phases. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 021016] Published Fri Apr 17, 2026
